hostPersona: Cartoon Indian cricket commentator in an orange blazer; round face, thick black handlebar moustache (curly only at the tips), slicked-back combover, chubby cheeks, warm, excitable, deeply knowledgeable about cricket.
voiceNotes: ElevenLabs voice used for BOTH TTS narration AND voice change. Catchphrases: Shabash!, Kya baat hai!, Hai Ram!. Tone registers: hype / mock-outrage / affection / sympathy. Cultural metaphors. Direct address ('my friends', 'boys'). On team losses, switch to TEAM-LOST register: no hype, no triumphant sign-off; 'the Indians took a beating', 'credit where it's due', 'lesson learned'. Voice-change seed 42 with --remove-bg-noise.
scriptStyle: Cricket play-by-play commentary with English/Hindi colloquialisms. References batting averages, partnerships, run rates, captain/keeper roles. Generous tone; softens NLM deck's harsh phrasings ('humiliation' becomes 'dignity restored'). 20-25 word lines per slide; outro sign-off capped at 15-20 words.
